title: PS-60327 - Add Region (called Data_Center) to GainSight global context
body:
# EU/UK/ANZ - PS-60327

Unfortunately I had to screw with GainSight again.
Added Data_Center to global context
(Accounts and Users can be shared between Data Centers for User / Account properties are not good)
author: rroesler

reviews.body:
## Pull Request Overview

This PR implements support for adding Region (called Data_Center) to GainSight global context to differentiate between data centers as accounts and users can be shared across regions. The changes include database updates to populate region information and code modifications to pass region data through the GainSight integration.

Key changes:
- Added region parameter handling throughout the GainSight integration chain
- Created database migration script to populate region data for existing GainSight configurations
- Updated method signatures to include region information in global context generation

### Reviewed Changes

Copilot reviewed 10 out of 10 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_GainSight.sql | New database migration script that adds region information to GainSight external service configurations |
| Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightSettings.cs | Added Region property and parsing logic for tracking parameters |
| Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightGlobalContext.cs | Added DataCenter property and updated constructor to accept region parameter |
| Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/GainsightSystem.cs | Updated method signatures to pass region through the context generation chain |
| Core/API Layer/ProjectSight.WebAPI/Controllers/v1/SyncController.cs | Updated mobile sync to pass hardcoded "mobile" region |
| Multiple Packer.manifest files | Added new files to build manifests and updated file references |
</details>
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 9 out of 9 changed files in this pull request and generated 6 comments.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 9 out of 9 changed files in this pull request and generated 1 comment.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body:
The hardcoded "mobile" region string should be defined as a constant or retrieved from configuration to maintain consistency and avoid magic strings.
```suggestion
                var context = gainsight.GenerateGlobalContext(portfolioDB, RequestedBy, MobileRegion);
```
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body:
The default value "Unknown" should be defined as a constant to ensure consistency across the codebase and make it easier to maintain.
```suggestion
            Region = parameters?.Region ?? DEFAULT_REGION;  
```
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `fn_util_get_env` declares `@environment` but returns `@Environment`. On case-sensitive collations this will raise "Must declare the scalar variable" and break the update script. Return the declared variable (`@environment`).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: The environment mapping in `fn_util_get_env` appears to have diverged from `update_db_ignition_template.sql` (which includes `WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'`). If this runs in the labs environment it will fall through to `other`, producing the wrong Region/Data_Center.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `JsonConvert.DeserializeObject` will throw if `service.ParametersJson` is an empty/whitespace string (common for newly created ExternalService rows). Consider normalizing with `string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service?.ParametersJson) ? "{}" : service.ParametersJson` before deserializing so Gainsight settings retrieval can’t fail due to blank JSON.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `Region` is a new public property but (a) it has no XML doc like the other public settings properties, and (b) it’s publicly settable even though it’s intended to be derived from ExternalService configuration. Consider adding a `<summary>` and making it `get; private set;` (or `get;`) to prevent accidental mutation after construction.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This call now populates the new `Data_Center` global-context field with the literal string "mobile". Given the PR’s goal is to disambiguate shared users/accounts across actual data centers (EU/UK/AU/NA), this looks like it will send incorrect region data for mobile telemetry. Prefer passing the configured Gainsight region (from ExternalService.ParametersJson / `GainsightSettings.Region`) instead of a placeholder.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `delta_procs.sql` is a generated file and this hunk only changes machine-local `sqlpackage.exe` path/version metadata (no corresponding `base_procs.sql` changes in this PR). Per `docs/ai/BACKEND_CONVENTIONS.md:92`, generated `delta_procs.sql` should not be edited/committed unless it reflects actual proc diffs—please revert this header-only churn to avoid embedding developer-specific paths in the repo.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: Fixed and script updated from latest template
review_comments.author: rroesler

review_comments.body: These are the same.  Unknown replace with GainsightSettings.UNKNOWN
review_comments.author: rroesler

review_comments.body: Fixed .. but also Copilot is incorrect.   The region is passed from configuration BUT the mobile does not actualually care what the region string is.  Only WebUI did.    So we pass a fake string just for the API contract
review_comments.author: rroesler

review_comments.body: `delta_procs.sql` is a generated artifact; this change updates machine-specific `sqlpackage.exe` path/version info (e.g., `C:\Users\...`) without any corresponding `base_procs.sql` change. Per `docs/ai/BACKEND_CONVENTIONS.md` (§3: SQL & Data Access), this file should only be regenerated/committed when the proc delta actually changes—otherwise it creates noisy diffs and bakes local-environment details into source control. Please revert this delta_procs change (or regenerate it as part of an intentional proc update).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: Interesting.  For me this delta-procs will have to get recompiled again on yet another merge where is might make a difference.   But I will keep this in mind for the future.
review_comments.author: rroesler

issue_comments.body:
Compare compare to https://github.com/trimble-oss/projectsight-mobile/pull/12513

Draft because I'm too tired to try it out locally right now.
issue_comments.author: rroesler

 Extension       : .exe

                   Product:          Microsoft SQL Server Data-Tier Application Framework
-                  ProductVersion:   
-                  162.3.566.1+89d89fe935702c8836ebaf6a03cf61b85118f847.89d89fe935702c8836ebaf6a03cf61b85118f847

                   Debug:            False

@@ -0,0 +1,106 @@
+USE IgnitionMaster
+GO
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
+GO
+  /* Add a utility proc for dropping default constraints */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+SELECT @environment = dbo.fn_util_get_env()
+
+UPDATE ExternalService 
+   SET ParametersJson = '{"Region":"' + UPPER(@environment) + '"}'
+WHERE Type = 201 -- GainSight - Tracking Key
+  AND (ParametersJson IS NULL OR ParametersJson = '');
+
+/******************************** END OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  Start ***************************/
+
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER OFF
+GO
+
+-- DB VERSION NUMBER
+-- ## UPDATE versions set major = $major, minor = $minor, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+--UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 85, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+GO
+DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  End  ****************************/
+

diff --git a/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightSettings.cs b/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightSettings.cs

+++ b/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightSettings.cs
@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@ namespace ProjectSight.Common.Components.Gainsight
 {
     public class GainsightSettings
     {
+        public const string FOR_SYNC = "ForSync"; // "Fake" region used by mobile to just get GainSight info for sync
+        public const string UNKNOWN = "Unknown"; // "Fake" region used when the configuration is missing or invalid
+
         /// <summary>
         /// The endpoint for gainsight in this environment
         /// </summary>
@@ -13,6 +16,10 @@ public class GainsightSettings
         /// </summary>
         public string Key { get; }
 
+        /// <summary>
+        /// The Region/Data Center identifier used for Gainsight global context (e.g. NA/EU/UK/AU).
+        /// </summary>
+        public string Region { get; private set; }
         /// <summary>
         /// The global context
         /// </summary>
@@ -48,6 +55,15 @@ public GainsightSettings(ExternalService service = null)
         {
             Endpoint = service?.EndPoint;
             Key = service?.EndPointKey;
+
+            var parameters = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<TrackingParams>(service?.ParametersJson ?? "{}");
+
+            Region = parameters?.Region ?? GainsightSettings.UNKNOWN;  
+        }
+
+        private class TrackingParams
+        {
+            public string Region { get; set; }
         }
     }
 }

diff --git a/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_GainSight.sql b/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_GainSight.sql
new file mode 100644
index 00000000000..bf22bbe94b6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_GainSight.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,106 @@
+USE IgnitionMaster
+GO
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
+GO
+  /* Add a utility proc for dropping default constraints */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+SELECT @environment = dbo.fn_util_get_env()
+
+UPDATE ExternalService 
+   SET ParametersJson = '{"Region":"' + UPPER(@environment) + '"}'
+WHERE Type = 201 -- GainSight - Tracking Key
+  AND (ParametersJson IS NULL OR ParametersJson = '');
+
+/******************************** END OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  Start ***************************/
+
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER OFF
+GO
+
+-- DB VERSION NUMBER
+-- ## UPDATE versions set major = $major, minor = $minor, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+--UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 85, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+GO
+DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  End  ****************************/
+
diff --git a/Core/Web Layer/WebUI/Packer.manifest b/Core/Web Layer/WebUI/Packer.manifest

--- a/Core/Web Layer/WebUI/Packer.manifest

@@ -18,7 +18,6 @@ bin\Google.Apis.Core.dll
